reviews.review_msg: Steve is truly one of the amazing professors at Beedie School of Business. He made the course very fun and easy to understand. He truly cares for his students and goes above and beyond to see them succeed. The course itself is not that difficult either. Just a couple of hours per week are enough to get a good grade. All the best for your journey!

My journey with Steve was perfectly perfect. He genuinely cares for his students. He mixes humour with the course contents which makes even the boring lectures super fun. In order to catch up with the course, you must read the chapter after its done in class. Honestly, I would love to take another class with Steve, he's just a great professor.

Professor Steve is the best professor so far. He makes the lectures so fun and easy. People who gave him a low ranking probably don't study well after his class. Trust me 2 hours of studying per WEEK is enough to get an A in this course. He's more like a friend than a professor. He also gives bonus quizzes to boost tour grade. :)
he is the best professor as he fuels you with the negativity that he gives you i highly recommand to people who can't do things.

He is the worst professor ever and I will never ever take a course with him even if I don't have any choice. He is awful and thinks his students know everything. He will never give feedbacks and he is like a torture to students. DO NOT take this course with him!
He is the worst professor Ive studied with. Would never take him again. Hes always gonna give a negative feedback and tries to look down on students all the time.
This professor doesn't give fair grades he thinks nobody can do better only he knows everything. Doesn't give good grades to deservings. Always says you did bad in everything
He's a complete disaster, rubbish, don't ever take his class or otherwise u gonna suck on ur own. He does not give marks and say at the end u did disaster

This man is the worst. Doesn't even encourage participation because he is so intimidating. He thinks he looks so cool but in reality he is just dumb. Tell him hi, he will hardly respond to you. Secondly, this prof forgets some of the stuff he teaches and tries to refer back to his NOTES!!! 3rd, when he explains he isnt even look at the class. :@
